map.action: fake_master on & fake_hp on & fake_hpmix on & setting_setsession 'eqModeDual' 'None' & setting_setsession 'exclusiveAudioAccess' 'Yes' & deck 2 effect_clone 1 & deck 3 effect_clone 1 & deck 4 effect_clone 1 & deck all effect_select_toggle 'stems' 'Echo Out' & effect_beats 'stems' 1bt
fake_master off & fake_hp off & fake_hpmix off
loop ? loop_adjust 'in' ? loop_adjust 'in' off & loop_select 4 : loop_select 4 : pioneer_loop 4
wheel_mode 'loop_in' ? blink 300ms : wheel_mode 'loop_out' ? off : loop ? blink 600ms : pioneer_loop_in
wheel_mode 'loop_out' ? blink 300ms : wheel_mode 'loop_in' ? off : loop ? blink 600ms : on
wheel_mode 'loop_in' ? blink 300ms : wheel_mode 'loop_out' ? off : loop ? blink 600ms : pioneer_loop_in
wheel_mode 'loop_out' ? blink 300ms : wheel_mode 'loop_in' ? off : loop ? blink 600ms : on
setting 'stemsRealtimeSeparation' 'fully disabled' ? off : setting 'eqModeDual' 'None' ? setting 'eqMode' 'Frequency' ? off : on : off
set '$ddjfx_ch' 1 & deck master effect_active off & effect_active 'sampler' off & deck all effect_active off & deck 1 effect_active 1 `var '$ddjfxon' ? on : off`
set '$ddjfx_ch' 2 & deck master effect_active off & effect_active 'sampler' off & deck all effect_active off & deck 2 effect_active 1 `var '$ddjfxon' ? on : off`
set '$ddjfx_ch' 3 & deck master effect_active off & effect_active 'sampler' off & deck all effect_active off & deck 3 effect_active 1 `var '$ddjfxon' ? on : off`
set '$ddjfx_ch' 4 & deck master effect_active off & effect_active 'sampler' off & deck all effect_active off & deck 4 effect_active 1 `var '$ddjfxon' ? on : off`
set '$ddjfx_ch' 0 & effect_active 'sampler' off & deck all effect_active off & deck master effect_active 1 `var '$ddjfxon' ? on : off`
set '$ddjfx_ch' 6 & effect_active 'sampler' `var '$ddjfxon' ? on : off` & deck master effect_active off & deck all effect_active off
deck master effect_select_toggle 'MT Delay' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'MT Delay' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'MT Delay'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'echo' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'echo' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'echo'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'Low Cut Echo' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'Low Cut Echo' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'Low Cut Echo'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'spiral' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'spiral' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'spiral'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'enigma jet' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'enigma jet' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'enigma jet'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'reverb' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'reverb' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'reverb'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'flanger' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'flanger' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'flanger'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'phaser' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'phaser' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'phaser'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'filter' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'filter' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'filter'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'cut' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'cut' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'cut'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'pitch' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'pitch' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'pitch'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'loop roll' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'loop roll' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'loop roll'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'mobius Saw' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'mobius Saw' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'mobius Saw'
deck master effect_select_toggle 'mobius Tri' & effect_select_toggle 'sampler' 'mobius Tri' & deck all effect_select_toggle 'mobius Tri'
shift ? deck master effect_slider 2 & effect_slider 'sampler' 2 & deck all effect_slider 2 : deck master effect_slider 1 & effect_slider 'sampler' 1 & deck all effect_slider 1

toggle '$ddjfxon' & var '$ddjfx_ch' 1 ? deck 1 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 2 ? deck 2 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 3 ? deck 3 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 4 ? deck 4 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 5 ? nothing : var '$ddjfx_ch' 6 ? effect_active 'sampler' : deck master effect_active
deck master effect_beats -1 & effect_beats 'sampler' -1 & deck all effect_beats -1
deck master effect_beats +1 & effect_beats 'sampler' +1 & deck all effect_beats +1

param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 1`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS12' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 2`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS13' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 1 effect_beats 3`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXCH2' 1 ? var_equal '$GRV6_FXS11' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 1`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS12' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 2`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS13' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 2 effect_beats 3`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXCH3' 1 ? var_equal '$GRV6_FXS11' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 1`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS12' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 2`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS13' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 3 effect_beats 3`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXCH4' 1 ? var_equal '$GRV6_FXS11' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 1`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS12' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 2`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS13' 1 ? param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck 4 effect_beats 3`' '8 bt' ? var_equal '$GRV6_FXS11' 1 ? param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 1`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 1`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 1`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 1`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 1`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 1`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : var_equal '$GRV6_FXS13' 1 ? param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '1/4 bt' ? constant 0.05 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '1/2 bt' ? constant 0.07 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '3/4 bt' ? constant 0.57 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '1 bt' ? constant 0.08 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '2 bt' ? constant 0.1 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '4 bt' ? constant 0.12 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '8 bt' ? constant 0.13 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '16 bt' ? constant 0.15 : param_equal '`deck master effect_beats 3`' '32 bt' ? constant 0.17 : constant 0.19 : constant 0.19 : constant0.19 : nothing

var '$ddjfx_ch' 1 ? deck 1 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 2 ? deck 2 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 3 ? deck 3 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 4 ? deck 4 effect_active : var '$ddjfx_ch' 5 ? nothing : var '$ddjfx_ch' 6 ? effect_active 'sampler' : deck master effect_active
